name: Two Harbors Investments Corp 8.125% Series A Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock ($25.00 liquidation preference per share)
summary: Two Harbors Investments Corp 8.125% Series A Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock represents a class of preferred equity issued by Two Harbors Investment Corp. The preferred stock has a liquidation preference of $25.00 per share and pays cumulative dividends. It is a REIT.
